title: Mossel Bay's Stellie Taute talks about making Mrs South Africa top 5
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay's Stellie Taute was announced a top five finalist of Mrs South Africa 2025 at Emperors Palace in Johannesburg last night, 14 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay's Stellie Taute was announced a top five finalist of Mrs South Africa 2025 at Emperors Palace in Johannesburg last night, 14 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Taute, who is the owner of the successful Loka Boutique, who was a finalist along with 29 other women from across the country, said she was shocked when her name was called as a top five finalist last night."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"And while she was not crowned Mrs South Africa 2025, she said making the top five was completely unexpected.","html":"And while she was not crowned Mrs South Africa 2025, she said making the top five was completely unexpected."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"If you see the video of me during the finals, when my name was called as top five, you will see how shocked I was,\" she said.","html":"\"If you see the video of me during the finals, when my name was called as top five, you will see how shocked I was,\" she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This journey has been so personal and I am just blown away. It is all very overwhelming.\"","html":"\"This journey has been so personal and I am just blown away. It is all very overwhelming.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Taute said she had received many messages of congratulations from Mossel Bay residents, friends, family and others from across the country.","html":"Taute said she had received many messages of congratulations from Mossel Bay residents, friends, family and others from across the country."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay's Stellie Taute was announced a top five finalist. Photo: Supplied","html":"Mossel Bay's Stellie Taute was announced a top five finalist. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It is absolutely amazing how supportive people have been,\" she said.","html":"\"It is absolutely amazing how supportive people have been,\" she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"My journey, my making the top five is for every women who feels they are not good enough. You can overcome your insecurities and achieve anything. If I can inspire just one women from this whole journey, that is what I want most of all.\"","html":"\"My journey, my making the top five is for every women who feels they are not good enough. You can overcome your insecurities and achieve anything. If I can inspire just one women from this whole journey, that is what I want most of all.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Taute thanked her husband, children and family for all their support, her pageant coach, Elani Pretorius, and her mentor Lechar Knechovich.","html":"Taute thanked her husband, children and family for all their support, her pageant coach, Elani Pretorius, and her mentor Lechar Knechovich."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Taute arrived back from Johannesburg this afternoon , 15 November.","html":"Taute arrived back from Johannesburg this afternoon , 15 November."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
